snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Aa Sajan | Satinder Sartaaj | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Aa Sajan by Satinder Sartaaj is not just a song, it’s a feeling. Written, composed, and sung by Sartaaj himself, the track captures the beauty of love, longing, and poetic expression in its purest form.

Speed Records presents the official video of “Aa Sajan”, a soulful Punjabi song sung by the legendary Satinder Sartaaj. Known for his poetic depth and timeless music, Sartaaj returns to touch hearts once again with another mesmerizing creation.

Satinder Sartaaj is back with a song that promises emotions, love and depth.
Watch the video now and get ready to experience something special.

#AaSajan #SatinderSartaaj #PunjabiSong #SatinderSartaajNewSong #LatestPunjabiSong #SatinderSartaajAllSong #NewPunjabiSong #PunjabiMusic #PunjabiHits #TrendingPunjabiMusic #SpeedRecords

YouTube Music
https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=LYVAR1aSIr8&si=TSf3Oqq7hVu1oypT

 
Credits :
Singer/Lyricist/ Composer:- Satinder Sartaaj
A film by :- Sunny Dhinsey
Music :- Prem & Hardeep
Mix and Master Sameer Charegaonkar

Aa Sajan… ਆ ਸੱਜਣ

ਆ ਸੱਜਣ, ਗਲ ਲਾ ਸੱਜਣ,
ਥੱਕ ਗਈ ਆਂ, ਰਾਹਵਾਂ ਨਿਹਾਰ !
ਤੇਰੇ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਨੇ, ਦਿਲ ਐਸੇ ਤੋੜੇ ਨੇ,
ਦੁੱਖ ਹੁਣ ਨਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਸਹਾਰ !
Come, beloved…Hold me close, just once.
I am exhausted—my eyes ache from watching the roads.
Separation from you has torn my heart apart.
This sorrow is now beyond what I can bear.

ਮਿੰਨਤਾਂ ਮੈਂ ਪਾਵਾਂ, ਵੇ ਕਰਦੀ ਦੁਆਵਾਂ !
ਹਾੜਾ ਵੇ ਇੱਕ ਵਾਰੀ ਸੁਣ ਆ ਕੇ ਹਾਵਾਂ !
ਤਰਲੇ ਮੈਂ ਕਰਦੀ, ਹਾਏ ਜਾਵਾਂ ਮਰਦੀ,
ਮੋਇਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਨਾ ਹੋਰ ਮਾਰ !
I offer prayers, I whisper my pleas.
Please listen to my sorrow once !
I beg you—I’m dying a little every day.
Do not strike what is already lifeless.

ਨਾ ਧੁੱਪ ਭਾਵੇ ਦਿਲ ਨੂੰ, ਨਾ ਛਾਂ ਚੰਗੀ ਲੱਗਦੀ !
ਇਹ ਜਿੰਦੜੀ ਕਿਸੇ ਨਾਗ ਨੇ ਡੰਗੀ ਲੱਗਦੀ !
ਤੇਰਾ ਰੋਗ ਖਾਂਦਾ, ਕਿ ਵਧਦਾ ਈ ਜਾਂਦਾ,
ਕੀਤੇ ਉਪਾਅ ਮੈਂ ਹਜ਼ਾਰ !
Neither sunlight soothes my soul,
Nor does the shade bring comfort.
This life feels like it’s been bitten by a serpent.
Your love—this illness—devours me without end,
Even though I’ve tried a thousand remedies.

ਤੂੰ ਆ ਜਾ ਵੇ ਛੇਤੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਜੀ ‘ਨੀ ਲੱਗਦਾ !
ਸਾਰੀ-ਸਾਰੀ ਰਾਤੀਂ ਰਵ੍ਹੇ ਦੀਵਾ ਜਗਦਾ !
ਕਰਾਂ ਜੇ ਹਨੇਰੇ, ਤਾਂ ਦੁੱਖ ਪਾਉਣ ਘੇਰੇ,
ਕਿ ਇੰਝ ਰਹੀਆਂ ਰਾਤਾਂ ਗੁਜ਼ਾਰ !
Please return soon, I can no longer live like this.
The lamp stare at me through every sleepless night.
When I put out the light, I’m surrounded by sorrow, This is how the nights pass.

ਵੇ ਸੱਜਣਾ ਨੂੰ ਐਨਾ ਦੁਖੀ ਨੀ ਕਰੀਦਾ !
ਜਿਹਨੂੰ ਮੀਤ ਮੰਨੀਏ, ਉਹਦਾ ਦਮ ਭਰੀਦਾ !
ਨਜ਼ਰ ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਟੋਲ੍ਹੇ, ਨਾ “ਸਰਤਾਜ” ਕੋਲ਼ੇ,
ਤਾਂ ਫਿਰ ਕੀ ਖਿਜ਼ਾ ਕੀ ਬਹਾਰ !
One should not bring such grief to a soul that truly loves.
The one we call our companion,
Should vouch for the same !
I am searching for my “Sartaaj” but he nowhere near, So what does it matter whether it’s autumn or spring ?

Like || Share || Spread || Love

Aa Sajan by Satinder Sartaaj is not just a song, it’s a feeling. Written, composed, and sung by Sartaaj himself, the track captures the beauty of love, longing, and poetic expression in its purest form.

Speed Records presents the official video of “Aa Sajan”, a soulful Punjabi song sung by the legendary Satinder Sartaaj. Known for his poetic depth and timeless music, Sartaaj returns to touch hearts once again with another mesmerizing creation.

Credits :
Singer/Lyricist/ Composer:- Satinder Sartaaj
A film by :- Sunny Dhinsey

Mix and Master Sameer Charegaonkar

Aa Sajan… ਆ ਸੱਜਣ

ਆ ਸੱਜਣ, ਗਲ ਲਾ ਸੱਜਣ,
ਥੱਕ ਗਈ ਆਂ, ਰਾਹਵਾਂ ਨਿਹਾਰ !
ਤੇਰੇ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਨੇ, ਦਿਲ ਐਸੇ ਤੋੜੇ ਨੇ,
ਦੁੱਖ ਹੁਣ ਨਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਸਹਾਰ !
Come, beloved…Hold me close, just once.
I am exhausted—my eyes ache from watching the roads.
Separation from you has torn my heart apart.
This sorrow is now beyond what I can bear.

ਮਿੰਨਤਾਂ ਮੈਂ ਪਾਵਾਂ, ਵੇ ਕਰਦੀ ਦੁਆਵਾਂ !
ਹਾੜਾ ਵੇ ਇੱਕ ਵਾਰੀ ਸੁਣ ਆ ਕੇ ਹਾਵਾਂ !
ਤਰਲੇ ਮੈਂ ਕਰਦੀ, ਹਾਏ ਜਾਵਾਂ ਮਰਦੀ,
ਮੋਇਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਨਾ ਹੋਰ ਮਾਰ !
I offer prayers, I whisper my pleas.
Please listen to my sorrow once !
I beg you—I’m dying a little every day.
Do not strike what is already lifeless.

ਨਾ ਧੁੱਪ ਭਾਵੇ ਦਿਲ ਨੂੰ, ਨਾ ਛਾਂ ਚੰਗੀ ਲੱਗਦੀ !
ਇਹ ਜਿੰਦੜੀ ਕਿਸੇ ਨਾਗ ਨੇ ਡੰਗੀ ਲੱਗਦੀ !
ਤੇਰਾ ਰੋਗ ਖਾਂਦਾ, ਕਿ ਵਧਦਾ ਈ ਜਾਂਦਾ,
ਕੀਤੇ ਉਪਾਅ ਮੈਂ ਹਜ਼ਾਰ !
Neither sunlight soothes my soul,
Nor does the shade bring comfort.
This life feels like it’s been bitten by a serpent.
Your love—this illness—devours me without end,
Even though I’ve tried a thousand remedies.

ਤੂੰ ਆ ਜਾ ਵੇ ਛੇਤੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਜੀ ‘ਨੀ ਲੱਗਦਾ !
ਸਾਰੀ-ਸਾਰੀ ਰਾਤੀਂ ਰਵ੍ਹੇ ਦੀਵਾ ਜਗਦਾ !
ਕਰਾਂ ਜੇ ਹਨੇਰੇ, ਤਾਂ ਦੁੱਖ ਪਾਉਣ ਘੇਰੇ,
ਕਿ ਇੰਝ ਰਹੀਆਂ ਰਾਤਾਂ ਗੁਜ਼ਾਰ !
Please return soon, I can no longer live like this.
The lamp stare at me through every sleepless night.
When I put out the light, I’m surrounded by sorrow, This is how the nights pass.

ਵੇ ਸੱਜਣਾ ਨੂੰ ਐਨਾ ਦੁਖੀ ਨੀ ਕਰੀਦਾ !
ਜਿਹਨੂੰ ਮੀਤ ਮੰਨੀਏ, ਉਹਦਾ ਦਮ ਭਰੀਦਾ !
ਨਜ਼ਰ ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਟੋਲ੍ਹੇ, ਨਾ “ਸਰਤਾਜ” ਕੋਲ਼ੇ,
ਤਾਂ ਫਿਰ ਕੀ ਖਿਜ਼ਾ ਕੀ ਬਹਾਰ !
One should not bring such grief to a soul that truly loves.
The one we call our companion,
Should vouch for the same !
I am searching for my “Sartaaj” but he nowhere near, So what does it matter whether it’s autumn or spring ?

Danganronpa 2x2 Psycho Tropical Vacation Package
This limited edition includes:
• Danganronpa 2x2 game (Customers can choose one of the following game options: a Nintendo Switch™2, Nintendo Switch, or PlayStation®5 physical edition, or a printed card with a Steam key.) *Danganronpa 2x2 Psycho Tropical Vacation Package (for Steam) is available exclusively from the Spike Chunsoft Official Store.

Danganronpa 2x2 includes a brand-new scenario based on Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair. The original scenario of Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair has been updated with new visuals and production value for modern game systems. Players will experience the shocking story, revamped to deliver a more beautiful and satisfying gameplay experience.
